ddls:
CREATE TABLE "business_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the business function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business function */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the business function record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the business function record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the business function record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the business function record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security practice */,
  "practice_name" TEXT /* Name of the security practice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security practice */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the security practice record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the security practice record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the security practice record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the security practice record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the activity record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the activity record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maturity_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maturity level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Description of the maturity level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the maturity level record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the maturity level record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the maturity level record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the maturity level record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business function being assessed */,
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security practice being evaluated */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity involved in the assessment */,
  "maturity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the maturity level associated with the assessment */,
  "question" TEXT /* The question posed during the assessment */,
  "guidance" TEXT /* Guidance provided based on the assessment response */,
  "answer_option" INTEGER /* Options for answering the assessment question */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_assessments_maturity_id FOREIGN KEY ("maturity_id") REFERENCES maturity_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_assessments_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_assessments_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES business_functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_assessments_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_id") REFERENCES security_practices ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guidance_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guidance document */,
  "guidance_text" TEXT /* Text of the guidance document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the guidance document record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the guidance document record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the guidance document record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the guidance document record was last modified */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the guidance document (e.g., policy, procedure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommended_technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommended technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the technology record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the technology record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the technology record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the technology record was last modified */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Type of the technology (e.g., software, hardware) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the stakeholder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder in security management */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the stakeholder record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the stakeholder record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the stakeholder record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the stakeholder record was last modified */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the stakeholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder attending the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "training_topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the training session */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "training_materials" TEXT /* Training materials provided during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_training_stakeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment (if applicable) */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder involved */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_stakeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES security_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance regulation */,
  "regulation_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_assessment_regulations" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security assessment */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id", "regulation_id")
)
